# scProportionTest

## Plotting Function: permutation_plot2

```{r}
permutation_plot2 <- function(infile, title="", Legend=F, label_colors=NULL){
  # Custom log2 fold change threshold.
  # Reference: /storage/lch/project/2023-02-07_hippo_single_cell/script/008proportionTest.r
  data <- read.csv(infile)
  data <- data[order(data$obs_log2FD, decreasing = T), ]
  data$clusters <- factor(data$clusters, levels=data$clusters, ordered=T)
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05", "NA")
  # Highlight specific labels
  label.color <- rep("black", length(data$clusters))
  names(label.color) <- data$clusters
  if (!is.null(label_colors)){
    for (i in names(label_colors)){
      label.color[i] <- label_colors[i]
    }
  }
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(clusters, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2)) +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05"="red", "NA"="black")) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_line(color="grey"),
          panel.background = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(fill=NA),
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = label.color, size=12)
    )
  if (Legend==F) {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none")
  } else {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  }
  return(p)
}
```

## Proportion Changes Relative to Total Cells

When performing single-cell proportion analysis, I found that the proportion of a certain cell subpopulation showed clear differences between groups. However, because there are only 3 samples per group, ANOVA could not detect significant differences. I need to publish this in a high-impact journal and cannot perform additional experiments. How should I present this observation? Are there any more lenient statistical methods?

### Permutation Test Combining All Three Treatment Groups

```{r}
# env: dhlab
# remotes::install_github("rpolicastro/scProportionTest")
library("scProportionTest")
setwd("/home/mouse_ad/002SC")
sobj <- readRDS("004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.rds")
outdir <- "004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
if ( ! dir.exists(outdir) ){
  dir.create(outdir)
}
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
prop_test <- sc_utils(sobj)
for (label in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2", "anno.L3")){
  # label <- "anno.L3"
  p.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    out.file <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    prop_test.result <- permutation_test(
          prop_test,
          cluster_identity = label,
          sample_1 = S2, sample_2 = S1,
          sample_identity = "treatment"
    )
    write.csv(prop_test.result@results$permutation,
              out.file,
              row.names = F)
  }
}
```

### Plot All Cell Types Together

```{r}
# env: thinkpad
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
for (label in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")){
  p.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    out.file <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    p <- permutation_plot2(out.file, title=paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2))
    p.list[[n]] <- p
    n <- n + 1
  }
 
  p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)
  if (label == "anno.L1"){
    ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/permutation_plot2.", label, ".png"),
         p, width=8, height=5)
  } else {
    ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/permutation_plot2.", label, ".png"),
         p, width=9, height=7)
  }
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/permutation_plot2.anno.L1.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/permutation_plot2.anno.L2.png")
```

### Plot All Glu Subtypes

```{r}
# env: thinkpad
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

permutation_plot2 <- function(infile, title="", Legend=F, label_colors=NULL){
  # Custom log2 fold change threshold.
  # Reference: /storage/lch/project/2023-02-07_hippo_single_cell/script/008proportionTest.r
  data <- read.csv(infile)
  data <- subset(data, grepl("Glu_", clusters))
  data <- data[order(data$obs_log2FD, decreasing = T), ]
  data$clusters <- factor(data$clusters, levels=data$clusters, ordered=T)
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05", "NA")
  # Highlight specific labels
  label.color <- rep("black", length(data$clusters))
  names(label.color) <- data$clusters
  if (!is.null(label_colors)){
    for (i in names(label_colors)){
      label.color[i] <- label_colors[i]
    }
  }
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(clusters, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), linetype="dashed", color="grey") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), linetype="dashed", color="grey") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("abs(obs_log2FD)>log2(1.2) & FDR<0.05"="red", "NA"="black")) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
          axis.text.y = element_text(color = label.color, size=9),
          axis.text.x = element_text(color = label.color, size=7),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size=8),
          axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  if (Legend==F) {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none")
  } else {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  }
  return(p)
}

pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
mapping <- c(WT_ctrl="WT-CTRL", AD_ctrl="5xFAD-CTRL", AD_5622="5xFAD-PLX")
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
label = "anno.L2"
p.list <- list()
n <- 1
for (pair in pairs) {
  S1 <- pair[1]
  S2 <- pair[2]
  out.file <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
  p <- permutation_plot2(out.file, title=paste0(mapping[S1], "_vs_", mapping[S2]))
  p.list[[n]] <- p
  n <- n + 1
}
p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)
ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/permutation_plot2.", label, ".glu.pdf"),
     p, width=5.2769, height=3.3)
```

### Plot Only Specified Cell Types

Using the combined results.

It is uncertain whether to use GABA or GABA_0, so both will be generated.

Select the GABA_0 results from the three comparison pairs and plot them on the same coordinate system.  
x = comparison, y = obs_log2FD

#### Style 1

```{r}
# env: thinkpad
# dependence: figure_process.Rmd # Load plotting functions
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
for (CT in c("GABA", "GABA_0", "GABA_1", "GABA_2", "GABA_3", "Micro", "Oligo", "OPC")) {
  if (CT %in% c("GABA_0", "GABA_1", "GABA_2", "GABA_3")) {
    label <- "anno.L2"
  } else {
    label <- "anno.L1"
  }
  data <- data.frame()
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    infile <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".",
                     S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    df <- read.csv(infile)
    df <- subset(df, clusters == CT, select=c("obs_log2FD", "FDR", "boot_mean_log2FD", "boot_CI_2.5", "boot_CI_97.5"))
    df$comparison <- paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2)
    data <- rbind(data, df)
  }
 
  data$comparison <- factor(data$comparison, levels=c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl",
                                                      "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl",
                                                      "AD_5622_vs_WT_ctrl"),
                            ordered=T)
 
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05", "NS")
 
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(comparison, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    labs(title=paste0(CT, " Proportion Change"), y="Observed Log<sub>2</sub>(Fold Change)") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) +
    theme_nature() +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_markdown(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title=element_blank(),
          legend.direction = "vertical",
          axis.title.y=element_blank())
 
  ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.png"), p, width=4.30, height=2.64)
}
```

#### Style 2: Space-Saving Version (Micro)

```{r}
# style 2
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
CT <- "Micro"
label <- "anno.L1"
data <- data.frame()
for (pair in pairs) {
  S1 <- pair[1]
  S2 <- pair[2]
  infile <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".",
                   S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
  df <- read.csv(infile)
  df <- subset(df, clusters == CT, select=c("obs_log2FD", "FDR", "boot_mean_log2FD", "boot_CI_2.5", "boot_CI_97.5"))
  df$comparison <- paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2)
  data <- rbind(data, df)
}
comparison.rename <- c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"="PL_vs_AD",
                       "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl"="AD_vs_WT",
                       "AD_5622_vs_WT_ctrl"="PL_vs_WT")
data$comparison <- comparison.rename[data$comparison]
data$comparison <- factor(data$comparison, levels=c("AD_vs_WT",
                                                    "PL_vs_AD",
                                                    "PL_vs_WT"),
                          ordered=T)
data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                           "|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05", "NS")
p <- ggplot(data, aes(comparison, obs_log2FD)) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
  labs(title="", y="Proportion Change<br>(Log<sub>2</sub> Fold Change)") +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) +
  theme_nature() +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle=30, vjust = 0.7, hjust=.7),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y=element_markdown())
ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.pdf"), p, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.png"), p, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, dpi=300)
ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.png"), p, width=4.30, height=2.64)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/GABA_0_proportion_change.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/Micro_proportion_change.png")
```

#### Style 2: Space-Saving Version (Oligo)

```{r oligo-proportion-change-pdf}
# style 2
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
# pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
# CT <- "Oligo"
for (CT in c("Oligo", "OPC")) {
  label <- "anno.L1"
  data <- data.frame()
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    infile <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".",
                     S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    df <- read.csv(infile)
    df <- subset(df, clusters == CT, select=c("obs_log2FD", "FDR", "boot_mean_log2FD", "boot_CI_2.5", "boot_CI_97.5"))
    df$comparison <- paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2)
    data <- rbind(data, df)
  }
 
  comparison.rename <- c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"="PL_vs_AD",
                         "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl"="AD_vs_WT")
                         # "AD_5622_vs_WT_ctrl"="PL_vs_WT")
 
  data$comparison <- comparison.rename[data$comparison]
 
  data$comparison <- factor(data$comparison, levels=c("AD_vs_WT",
                                                      "PL_vs_AD"),
                                                      # "PL_vs_WT"),
                            ordered=T)
 
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05", "NS")
 
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(comparison, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    labs(title="", y="Proportion Change<br>(Log<sub>2</sub> Fold Change)") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) +
    theme_nature() +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=30, vjust = 0.7, hjust=.7),
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.title.y=element_markdown())
 
  ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.pdf"), p, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, device = cairo_pdf)
  ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.png"), p, width=1.4861, height=1.8333, dpi=300)
}
```

#### Oligo Subtypes (Relative to Total Cells)

```{r}
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest"
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
for (CT in c("Oligo_0", "Oligo_1", "Oligo_2")) {
  label <- "anno.L3"
  data <- data.frame()
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    infile <- paste0(outdir, "/", label, ".",
                     S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    df <- read.csv(infile)
    df <- subset(df, clusters == CT, select=c("obs_log2FD", "FDR", "boot_mean_log2FD", "boot_CI_2.5", "boot_CI_97.5"))
    df$comparison <- paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2)
    data <- rbind(data, df)
  }
 
  data$comparison <- factor(data$comparison, levels=c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl",
                                                      "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl",
                                                      "AD_5622_vs_WT_ctrl"),
                            ordered=T)
 
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05", "NS")
 
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(comparison, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    labs(title=paste0(CT, " Proportion Change"), y="Observed Log<sub>2</sub>(Fold Change)") +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) +
    theme_nature() +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_markdown(),
          legend.position = "bottom",
          legend.title=element_blank(),
          legend.direction = "vertical",
          axis.title.y=element_blank())
 
  ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, "_proportion_change.png"), p, width=4.30, height=2.64)
}
```

## Proportion Changes Relative to anno.L2 Level

### Permutation Test

Proportion changes of DAM and HOM within Micro.

```{r}
library("scProportionTest")
outdir <- "002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype"
if ( ! dir.exists(outdir) ){
  dir.create(outdir)
}
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
Idents(sobj) <- "anno.L2"
for (CT in c("Micro", "GABA_0", "Oligo")) {
  if (CT %in% c("Micro", "GABA_0")) next
  # CT <- "GABA_0"
  sobj.sub <- subset(sobj, idents=CT)
  prop_test <- sc_utils(sobj.sub)
 
  p.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    out.file <- paste0(outdir, "/", CT, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    prop_test.result <- permutation_test(
          prop_test,
          cluster_identity = "anno.L3",
          sample_1 = S2, sample_2 = S1,
          sample_identity = "treatment"
    )
    write.csv(prop_test.result@results$permutation,
              out.file,
              row.names = F)
  }
}
```

### Plotting

```{r}
# env: thinkpad
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
pairs <- list()
pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl")
pairs[[3]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
outdir <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype"
for (CT in c("Micro", "GABA_0")) {
 
  # CT <- "GABA_0"
 
  p.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    out.file <- paste0(outdir, "/", CT, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    p <- permutation_plot2(out.file, title=paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2))
    p.list[[n]] <- p
    n <- n + 1
  }
 
  p <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)
  ggsave(paste0(outdir, "/", CT, ".permutation_plot2.png"),
         p, width=8, height=4)
}
```

### Oligo Subtypes

```{r oligo-subtype-proportion-total-pdf}
# The permutationPlot.target_ct function is located in: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/manuscript/figure_process.Rmd

library(ggplot2)

permutationPlot.target_ct2 <- function(CT, Title, in.prefix) {
  pairs <- list()
  pairs[[1]] <- c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl")
  pairs[[2]] <- c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl")
 
  data <- data.frame()
  # Retrieve statistical results for the specific cell type across the three comparison pairs.
  for (pair in pairs) {
    S1 <- pair[1]
    S2 <- pair[2]
    infile <- paste0(in.prefix, ".", S1, "_vs_", S2, ".csv")
    df <- read.csv(infile)
    df <- subset(df, clusters == CT, select=c("obs_log2FD", "FDR", "boot_mean_log2FD", "boot_CI_2.5", "boot_CI_97.5"))
    df$comparison <- paste0(S1, "_vs_", S2)
    data <- rbind(data, df)
  }
 
  comparison.rename <- c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"="PL_vs_AD",
                         "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl"="AD_vs_WT")
 
  data$comparison <- comparison.rename[data$comparison]
 
  data$comparison <- factor(data$comparison, levels=c("AD_vs_WT",
                                                      "PL_vs_AD"),
                            ordered=T)
 
  data$point.color <- ifelse(abs(data$obs_log2FD) > log2(1.2) & data$FDR<0.05,
                             "|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05", "NS")
 
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(comparison, obs_log2FD)) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin=boot_CI_2.5, ymax=boot_CI_97.5)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=log2(1.2), color="grey", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_point(aes(color=point.color)) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("|FC| > 1.2 & FDR < 0.05"="red", "NS"="black")) +
    theme_nature() +
    theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle=30, vjust = 0.7, hjust=.7),
          legend.position = "none",
          axis.title.y=element_markdown())
}

CT <- "Oligo_0"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo"
p1 <- permutationPlot.target_ct2(CT, CT, in.prefix) +
  labs(y="Proportion change<br> in Oligo<br>(Log2 Fold Change)", title=CT)

CT <- "Oligo_1"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo"
p2 <- permutationPlot.target_ct2(CT, CT, in.prefix) +
  labs(title=CT) + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pall <- p1 | p2
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo_subtype_proportion.pdf",
       pall, width=4, height=2.2, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo_subtype_proportion.png",
       pall, width=4, height=2.2, dpi=300)

# Relative to total cells
CT <- "Oligo_0"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/anno.L3"
p1 <- permutationPlot.target_ct2(CT, Title, in.prefix) +
  labs(y="Proportion change <br> in total cells <br> (Log2 Fold Change)", title=CT)

CT <- "Oligo_1"
in.prefix <- "../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest/anno.L3"
p2 <- permutationPlot.target_ct2(CT, Title, in.prefix) +
  labs(title=CT) + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank())

pall <- p1 | p2
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo_subtype_proportion_total.pdf",
       pall, width=4, height=2.2, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/003proportion/scProportionTest_subtype/Oligo_subtype_proportion_total.png",
       pall, width=4, height=2.2, dpi=300)
```
